Details: Packed tower aeration can achieve very high PCE removal (greater than 90 to greater than 99.9 percent), including in full-scale treatment of drinking water [1627, 2303, 2434]. USEPA has identified packed tower aeration as a Best Available Technology for removal of TCE from drinking water [1250]. Studies also have shown high removals using tray aeration (greater than 99.99 percent) and membrane air stripping (up to 79 percent) [1627, 2437].
